about.title: About War Data Hub
about.description: War Data Hub is a curated aggregator of conflict research resources, bringing together the most reliable data sources, maps, reports, OSINT tools, and analysis for researchers, journalists, and analysts.
about.methodology: All resources are manually reviewed and verified. We prioritize free, open-access sources and note when premium resources are included.

footer.disclaimer: For research purposes only. Always verify information from multiple sources.
